headline: Pan Borneo Sabah Contractor Terminated After 3 Years
context: Government terminated main Sabah Pan Borneo Highway contractor in February 2026 after 3 years of delays on RM12.8 billion package.

cards.big: Main Sabah Pan Borneo contractor terminated after 3 years of delays
cards.sub: RM12.8 billion package was only 31% complete against scheduled 72% milestone

cards.big: Contractor claimed RM2.4 billion in cost escalation government refused to pay
cards.sub: Audit found RM680 million in claimed costs lacked supporting documentation

cards.big: New contractor consortium includes 4 Sabah-based firms awarded replacement
cards.sub: Revised completion date pushed to 2030 adding 4 years to original deadline

cards.big: 12,000 construction workers faced delayed wages totalling RM48 million
cards.sub: Labour Department intervened to ensure wage recovery before termination

cards.big: Contractor failure tests whether mega-project accountability protects public interest
Contractor terminated after 3 years on Pan Borneo Sabah. Procurement failures compound infrastructure delays.
